entity.summary: Multichain decentralized trading protocol operated under the BMX brand, combining spot AMM swaps, perpetual markets, and the Classic and Freestyle product lines across Base, Mode, and Sonic.
entity.notes: HEI treats BMX Classic AMM, Classic Perps, Freestyle, and other BMX trading surfaces as products of one continuing BMX entity rather than separate exchanges. The current first-party URL is preserved but was not independently rendered by the review environment, so URL status remains live_unverified.

evidence.title: BMX official trading platform
evidence.notes: First-party domain identified by the current protocol directory as the BMX trading platform. The record preserves the parent brand rather than a product-specific Classic AMM entity.

evidence.title: BMX protocol trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current TVL, fees, spot DEX volume, perpetual volume, and deployments on Base, Mode, and Sonic, corroborating active operation and parent-level consolidation.
